title: app/Http/Kernel.php removed
description: The HTTP Kernel file is removed in L11. All middleware configuration moves to bootstrap/app.php withMiddleware().

title: app/Exceptions/Handler.php removed
description: The Exception Handler file is removed in L11. All exception configuration moves to bootstrap/app.php withExceptions().

title: app/Console/Kernel.php removed
description: The Console Kernel is removed in L11. Schedule definitions move to routes/console.php using Schedule facade.

title: bootstrap/app.php completely rewritten
description: The bootstrap/app.php file changes from IoC container bootstrap to Application::configure() builder pattern.

title: Global middleware stack moved to framework defaults
description: L11 ships its own default global middleware stack. Only custom, non-default middleware needs to be registered.

title: bootstrap/providers.php introduced
description: L11 introduces bootstrap/providers.php for service provider registration. config/app.php providers array still works but is deprecated pattern.

title: RouteServiceProvider removed in favour of withRouting()
description: Route registration is now handled via the withRouting() builder method in bootstrap/app.php.

title: $routeMiddleware renamed to $middlewareAliases
description: The $routeMiddleware property was renamed to $middlewareAliases in L10.1. L11 removes the Kernel entirely.

title: Built-in /up health check endpoint
description: L11 ships with a /up health check endpoint by default via withRouting(health: '/up').

title: SQLite is now the default database driver
description: L11 ships with SQLite as the default DB_CONNECTION. Production apps must set DB_CONNECTION in .env.

title: Rate limiter definitions move out of Kernel
description: Rate limiter definitions in Kernel::configureRateLimiting() should move to AppServiceProvider::boot().

title: TrustProxies now built into framework
description: TrustProxies is now a built-in framework feature configurable via $middleware->trustProxies() in bootstrap/app.php.

title: Optional date-based migration numbering
description: L11 introduces optional date-based migration numbering (0001_01_01_*). Existing timestamp-based migrations continue to work.

title: PHP 8.2 minimum requirement
description: Laravel 11 requires PHP 8.2 or higher. PHP 8.1 is no longer supported.

title: QUEUE_CONNECTION defaults to sync
description: L11 defaults QUEUE_CONNECTION to sync. Production apps must set QUEUE_CONNECTION in .env.
